memberdef.type: std::variant< std::monostate, double, float, half, bfloat16, uint8_t, int32_t >
memberdef.definition: using hipdnn_frontend::graph::TensorAttributes::ValueVariant = std::variant<std::monostate, double, float, half, bfloat16, uint8_t, int32_t>
memberdef.name: ValueVariant

briefdescription.para: Variant type for storing pass-by-value scalar values.
Default constructor.
Construct a pass-by-value tensor from a scalar.

parameterdescription.para: Scalar type (float, double, half, hip_bfloat16, uint8_t, int32_t)
The scalar value to store in the tensor

briefdescription.para: Check if this tensor is a pass-by-value tensor.

simplesect.para: true if the tensor contains an embedded scalar value

briefdescription.para: Get the pass-by-value scalar of a specific type.

simplesect.para: The scalar value if it matches type T, std::nullopt otherwise

briefdescription.para: Set a pass-by-value scalar in this tensor.

parameterdescription.para: Scalar type (float, double, half, hip_bfloat16, uint8_t, int32_t)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Clear the pass-by-value scalar.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Get the unique identifier of this tensor.

simplesect.para: The tensor UID

briefdescription.para: Get the name of this tensor.

simplesect.para: The tensor name

briefdescription.para: Get the data type of this tensor.

simplesect.para: The DataType enum value

briefdescription.para: Get the strides of this tensor.

simplesect.para: Vector of strides for each dimension

briefdescription.para: Get the dimensions of this tensor.

simplesect.para: Vector of dimension sizes

briefdescription.para: Get the total number of elements in this tensor.

simplesect.para: Product of all dimension sizes

briefdescription.para: Check if this tensor is virtual (intermediate result)

simplesect.para: true if virtual, false if physical (requires memory allocation)

briefdescription.para: Check if this tensor has a UID assigned.

simplesect.para: true if a UID has been set

briefdescription.para: Set the unique identifier for this tensor.

parameterdescription.para: The unique identifier (used for memory mapping during execution)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Set a human-readable name for this tensor.

parameterdescription.para: The tensor name (for debugging and logging)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Set the data type of this tensor.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Set the strides for this tensor.

parameterdescription.para: Vector of strides for each dimension

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining
Strides must have the same size as dimensions

briefdescription.para: Set the dimensions for this tensor.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Set whether this tensor is virtual.

parameterdescription.para: true for virtual tensors (intermediates), false for physical

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Convenience method to mark tensor as output (non-virtual)

parameterdescription.para: true to mark as output, false to mark as virtual

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Clear the UID from this tensor.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Fill unset attributes from graph context.

detaileddescription.para:
graphAttributes
The graph attributes to inherit from
Reference to this for method chaining
If data type is not set, it will be inferred from the graph's io_data_type (for physical tensors) or intermediate_data_type (for virtual tensors).

briefdescription.para: Validate tensor attributes.

detaileddescription.para:
Error indicating success or describing what is invalid
Checks that:
Data type is set
Virtual tensors are not pass-by-value
Dimensions and strides have matching sizes
Dimensions are non-empty and positive

briefdescription.para: Describes the properties and configuration of a tensor.

detaileddescription.para: TensorAttributes is used to define tensors that participate in hipDNN operations. Each tensor has dimensions, strides, a data type, and optionally a unique identifier for mapping to device memory during execution.

Tensors can be:
Physical tensors: Have a UID and map to actual device memory
Virtual tensors: Intermediate results that don't require explicit memory allocation
Pass-by-value tensors: Scalar values embedded directly in the tensor
